Video.summary: Did you know that ducks are waterproof?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Ducks

Video.summary: Huskies can have heterochromia, a condition where one eye is blue and the other is brown.
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Siberian Huskies

Image.alt: TPC That's My Pet | Siberian Huskies
TPC That's My Pet | Siberian Huskies
TPC That's My Pet | Siberian Huskies

Video.summary: No animal is off limits in this collection of hilarious clips.
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Livin' the Wild Life

Image.alt: Animals Unscripted | Livin' the Wild Life
Animals Unscripted | Livin' the Wild Life
Animals Unscripted | Livin' the Wild Life

Video.summary: All kinds of funny animals. In no particular order. With no rhyme or reason. Just sit and watch.
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Wild Cards

Video.summary: The pups and the kitties are here to play fetch in a 10 round face off to find our furry weight champion.
Video.title: Paws VS. Claws | Fetching

Video.summary: It’s bath time! Let’s see which of our furry friends does a better job getting clean in a 10- round face off!
Video.title: Paws VS. Claws | Grooming

Video.summary: Dogs or cats, paws or claws - playtime is for everyone to have fun!
Video.title: Paws VS. Claws | Playtime

Video.summary: Get ready for adorable dog siblings vs mischievous cat siblings - who will steal the spotlight?
Video.title: Paws VS. Claws | Siblings

Video.summary: Pups vs Kitties: 10-round face-off for the furry weight champion!
Video.title: Paws VS. Claws | Little Legends

Video.summary: The snow battle of the frosty frenemies - Who will win?
Video.title: Paws VS. Claws | Snow Buddies

Video.summary: In a world of furry chaos, love is the ultimate purr-fect match.
Video.title: Paws VS. Claws | In Love

Video.summary: Splashing into the deep end, these furry friends are making a big wave!
Video.title: Paws VS. Claws | Water Babies

Video.summary: Furry chaos ensues as mischief and mayhem take center stage. Tune in to watch!
Video.title: Paws VS. Claws | Antics

Video.summary: The cuddliest cats and dogs face off in a fur-tastic 10-round battle! Who will reign purr-eme? Tune in!
Video.title: Paws VS. Claws | Cuddles

Video.summary: It's chow time! 30 pets are eating well today!
Video.title: Crazy Fun Time Pet Countdown | Good Eaters

Image.alt: Crazy Fun Time Pet Countdown | Good Eaters
Crazy Fun Time Pet Countdown | Good Eaters
Crazy Fun Time Pet Countdown | Good Eaters

Video.summary: Animals are cute...but even cuter when they are sleeping!

Crazy Fun Time Pet Countdown | Sleepy Snoozers
Crazy Fun Time Pet Countdown | Sleepy Snoozers

Video.summary: We’ve got a pushy peacock, a baby goat hitching a ride, and some truly wild turkeys!

Countdown: The Funniest Pets | Wild Turkeys!
Countdown: The Funniest Pets | Wild Turkeys!

Video.summary: Pets make daring escapes, travel the world, and have a bit of an attitude.
Video.title: TPC Theatre | The Great Escape

Video.summary: Did you ever hear the story of Hank the Tank? Lord Covenington shares it with you today.
Video.title: TPC Theatre | The Legend of Hank The Tank

Video.summary: JK! There are plenty of mutts in this episode of cute dog breeds.
Video.title: We Heart Animals | No Ifs, Ands or Mutts

Image.alt: We Heart Animals | No Ifs, Ands or Mutts
We Heart Animals | No Ifs, Ands or Mutts
We Heart Animals | No Ifs, Ands or Mutts

Video.summary: Before they were cats, they were adorable kittens. In this episode, we're really kitten around.
Video.title: We Heart Animals | Kitten Around

Video.summary: HOP, SKIP, LEAAAAAP!
Video.title: Pet Obsessed | Leap Year

Video.summary: You know what's lazier than dog dayz? Cat dayz.
Video.title: Pet Obsessed | Lazy Dayz

Video.summary: How to handle the "if I fits, I sits" mentality, furry flight risks, and your pet’s proclivity for noise.
Video.title: Dr. Phur | If I Fits, I Sits

Image.alt: Dr. Phur | If I Fits, I Sits
Dr. Phur | If I Fits, I Sits
Dr. Phur | If I Fits, I Sits

Video.summary: Pets who always overreact or exaggerate every situation
Video.title: Dr. Phur | Drama Kings & Queens

Video.summary: In this special, we celebrate pets and what makes them the coolest, most amazing, most valuable pets ever!
Video.title: TPC Most Valuable Pets

Video.summary: Think pets couldn’t get cooler? Watch these talented animals show off their amazing skills!
Video.title: TPC Most Valuable Pets 2

Video.summary: Horses aplenty and raccoons galore! Animals do things you’d never expect- and say things you won’t believe.
Video.title: Animals Undercover | Animals Alone

Video.summary: Animals aren’t always the hero- sometimes they’re the villain, or a plain old bad neighbor.
Video.title: Animals Undercover | Security!

Video.summary: Listen in as animals reveal the truth behind their breed, meander the neighborhood, and steal some packages.
Video.title: Animals Undercover | Friendly Neighborhood Mountain Lion

Image.alt: Animals Undercover | Friendly Neighborhood Mountain Lion
Animals Undercover | Friendly Neighborhood Mountain Lion
Animals Undercover | Friendly Neighborhood Mountain Lion

Video.summary: There are party animals, and then there are party crashers. We’ve got them both, plus: animals after dark.
Video.title: Animals Undercover | Monkeys and Fish and Deer, Oh My!

Image.alt: Animals Undercover | Monkeys and Fish and Deer, Oh My!
Animals Undercover | Monkeys and Fish and Deer, Oh My!
Animals Undercover | Monkeys and Fish and Deer, Oh My!

Video.summary: Whether it’s pitching in around the house or opening the door for their siblings, animals just want to help!
Video.title: Animals Undercover | Scaredy Cat

Video.summary: Animals steal food, ring the doorbell, and even show up at work! You won’t want to miss what they have to say.
Video.title: Animals Undercover | Were You Eating That?

Image.alt: Animals Undercover | Were You Eating That?
Animals Undercover | Were You Eating That?
Animals Undercover | Were You Eating That?

Video.summary: Don’t fret when your pet flunks out of obedience school. They have other talents- like performing!
Video.title: Animals Undercover | Obedience School Dropout

Video.summary: Animals are racking up a bill, having a ball, and wowing the crowd with everything they have to say!
Video.title: Animals Undercover | Animals Just Wanna Have Fun

Image.alt: Animals Undercover | Animals Just Wanna Have Fun
Animals Undercover | Animals Just Wanna Have Fun
Animals Undercover | Animals Just Wanna Have Fun

Video.summary: Animals are messing up and showing off. Not to mention stopping traffic, giving advice, and going for a swim!
Video.title: Animals Undercover | Animal Crossing

Video.summary: Animals are hitting the road, diving under water, and talking a lot!
Video.title: Animals Undercover | Roadtrip!

Video.summary: Mischief and mayhem—animals caught in their silliest, sneakiest acts!
Video.title: Animals Undercover | Animal Antics

Video.summary: Some animals are geniuses… others are dumpster divers. Maybe their star sign has something to do with it?
Video.title: Animals Undercover | What’s Your Sign?

Video.summary: Animals are brave and heroic, but also guilty and criminal. Tune in to see which side of the law they fall on!
Video.title: Animals Undercover | Comic Book Critters

Video.summary: From the open road to the farm to your own backyard, these animals have plenty to say!
Video.title: Animals Undercover | On the Road Again

Image.alt: Animals Undercover | On the Road Again
Animals Undercover | On the Road Again
Animals Undercover | On the Road Again

Video.summary: Balancing, burpees, big jumps and more, this episode is a nonstop talent spectacle you don't want to miss!
Video.title: World's Most Talented Pets | Drive, Dive, and High Five

Image.alt: World's Most Talented Pets | Drive, Dive, and High Five
World's Most Talented Pets | Drive, Dive, and High Five
World's Most Talented Pets | Drive, Dive, and High Five

Video.summary: Tune in for animals dropping in, diving down, and laying out for the title!
Video.title: World's Most Talented Pets | Fearless Furry and Feathery Fliers

Image.alt: World's Most Talented Pets | Fearless Furry and Feathery Fliers
World's Most Talented Pets | Fearless Furry and Feathery Fliers
